channel.title: Combined Politepol Feed
channel.description: Merged feed from multiple Politepol sources

item.title: EU mutual assistance clause is unambiguous: Macron
item.description: The EU's mutual assistance clause is unambiguous, French President Emmanuel Macron said on Saturday, after the bloc's leaders asked officials to prepare a blueprint for how it would work amid doubts over Washington's commitment to NATO. President Donald Trump's criticism of NATO for failing to bac Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: BBC will cut up to 2,000 jobs to reduce costs by about 10pc
item.description: The BBC said Wednesday that it plans to cut up to 2,000 jobs to save 10% of its annual budget - 500 million pounds ($677 million) - over the next two years. The layoffs announced during a call with staff are the biggest in more than a decade at the U.K. national broadcaster. "I know this creates Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Ukraine's Zelenskiy arrives in Jordan for next leg of Gulf tour
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy arrived in Jordan ​on Sunday as part of a ‌Gulf tour aimed at shoring up defence ties with countries in the region amid ​rising tensions over the Iran ​war. Zelenskiy is seeking support from Gulf ⁠states for Ukraine's war against Russia ​as Western mili Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: France detains two more suspects over foiled Paris Bank of America attack
item.description: French authorities have arrested two more suspects over a ​foiled attack on Bank of America’s Paris offices, the country’s anti-terrorism prosecutor’s office said ‌on Sunday. “Two further individuals were taken into police custody last night as part of the investigatio Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: London Jewish community ambulances set ablaze in antisemitic attack, PM says
item.description: Four ambulances belonging ​to a Jewish community organisation in north London were set ablaze overnight in what British Prime ‌Minister Keir Starmer called "a deeply shocking antisemitic arson attack". The London Fire Brigade, which sent six fire engines and 40 firefighters to the scene, said Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Russia says Ukraine controls 15–17 per cent of Donetsk region
item.description: The Russian-installed head of ​Ukraine's Donetsk region, ‌Denis Pushilin, told Russian president Vladimir Putin ​at a ​meeting shown on state ⁠TV on Tuesday ​that Ukraine controls around ​15-17 per cent of the region. Russia claims the whole of ​the Donetsk region as part ​of Russia and says Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Greece sees deal to buy Italian-made frigates by April, minister says
item.description: Greece hopes to wrap up talks and sign a deal ​for the purchase of Bergamini class ‌frigates from Italy by April, Defence Minister Nikos Dendias said in an interview ​released on Sunday. High-ranking officials from ​Greece and Italy last year signed memorandums for ⁠naval cooperation, opening Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Slovakia PM Fico to meet EU's von der Leyen to push for restart of Druzhba oil flows
item.description: Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico said on Sunday he ‌would meet with EU chief Ursula von der Leyen on Tuesday, as Slovakia and Hungary ramp up pressure on Ukraine to restart Russian oil flows, warning Slovakia could block a major EU ​loan to Kyiv. Russian oil flows through the Druzhba pipelin Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Explosion hits US embassy in Oslo, causing minor damage, police say
item.description: The US embassy in Oslo was hit by an explosion early on Sunday, causing minor damage but no injuries, Norwegian police said. A loud blast was heard near the embassy compound in western Oslo at around 1am (0000 GMT), and smoke was seen rising from the area, eyewitnesses told local media. "We've de Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Plane carrying newly printed currency crashes, killing 15
item.description: Lockheed C-130 Hercules cargo plane carrying newly printed Bolivian banknotes crashed Friday near the capital, leaving at least 15 people dead, injuring others and damaging numerous vehicles, officials said. Defense Minister Marcelo Salinas said the aircraft skidded off the runway while landing at Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Buses, trams and trains grind to a halt across Germany at start of 2-day strike
item.description: Buses, trams and trains across Germany ground to a halt early Friday as local transport workers heeded a call by the Verdi public sector union to stage a strike on Feb 27 and 28. The union is aiming to gain leverage in negotiations that cover working conditions, specifically working hours and shif Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Cuba situation escalating, humanitarian needs must be solved: Kremlin
item.description: The Kremlin said on Thursday that the situation in Cuba was heating up and called for restraint after a deadly incident with a Florida-registered speedboat off the coast of the Caribbean island. Cuban forces killed four exiles and wounded six others who sailed into Cuban waters aboard a speedboat Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Modi urges India to conserve fuel as global price surges
item.description: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Sunday urged citizens and businesses to conserve fuel and revive work-from-home practices to cut petrol and diesel consumption, as a surge in global energy prices strains the country's foreign exchange reserves. People and businesses should prioritise a retur Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Ukraine, Russia ceasefire strained as both sides report weekend attacks
item.description: A US-mediated ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine appeared under serious strain on Sunday, with both sides trading blame for weekend attacks. The three-day pause, announced on Friday by President Donald Trump, is part of a broader US-led push for peace that has so far failed to end the more than Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Iran sends its response to US proposal aimed at ending the war, IRNA says
item.description: Iran has sent its response to ​a U.S. proposal aimed ‌at ending the more than two-month warto mediator, Pakistan, Iran's IRNA ​news agency said ​on Sunday. According to Iran's proposal, ⁠the current phase of ​negotiations will focus exclusively on ​the cessation of hostilities in the region, Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Passengers begin evacuating from cruise ship hit by hantavirus
item.description: Groups of passengers and crew disembarked from a cruise ship hit by a hantavirus outbreak on Sunday to be evacuated to their respective countries in a process overseen by global health officials and expected to last until Monday. The passengers, none of whom were showing symptoms of the virus, wer Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Trump administration says its war in Iran has been ‘terminated’ before 60-day deadline
